rationale: The only resume change was swapping employer names (re:cinq→Acme, Optilyz→Pinepoint, GISCollective→Northwind Labs). Both evaluations reach substantively identical conclusions: borderline candidate, strong GIS/distributed-systems background, lacking recent C++/Rust. The 1-point score difference is accompanied only by reworded reasoning and minor surfacing of details (Green Map, DLang fundamentals) that fall within ordinary run-to-run variation. No concern, credit, or shifted reasoning keys off the company-name change itself.
